title: Moosend vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Moosend vs Omnisend: pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
intro: Moosend and Omnisend are both freemium email marketing platforms, but they cater to different business needs. Moosend focuses on affordable email automation for small businesses, while Omnisend specializes in omnichannel marketing for e-commerce brands. This comparison will help you decide which platform aligns best with your goals.
choose_a_if: You want unlimited emails at the lowest possible cost
Your business is not e-commerce focused and needs basic email automation
You're a startup or small business looking to maximize budget efficiency
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store and need SMS and email together
You want pre-built workflows designed specifically for online retailers
Advanced segmentation and omnichannel automation are priorities for your business

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Moosend excels in affordability and email-only automation, making it ideal for small businesses. Omnisend is better for e-commerce brands needing SMS, push notifications, and omnichannel capabilities. Choose based on your specific requirements.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Omnisend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to Omnisend's $16/month. Moosend also offers a more generous free tier with 1,000 subscribers versus Omnisend's 250. However, if you need SMS capabilities, Omnisend's integrated solution may offer better overall value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms including both Moosend and Omnisend allow you to export your contact lists and historical data. However, you may lose some platform-specific features like Omnisend's SMS history. Both platforms offer migration support to ease the transition.
